items.title: Favorite
items.reason: PFJ intentionally uses Red Hat star icons — design choice, not a bug

items.title: Hamburger aria-expanded
items.reason: aria-expanded is set dynamically when used in masthead toggle, not on standalone button

items.title: Hamburger aria-label
items.reason: PFJ uses 'Menu' which is more semantic than PF's 'Hamburger' — design choice

items.title: Hamburger expanded/collapsed
items.reason: Animated button states already implemented in component; demo expansion not needed

items.title: Plain with no padding icon
items.reason: Demo icon choice (close vs question-circle) is a showcase styling decision

items.title: Stateful variants
items.reason: Added clicked variants, plain stateful variants, and plain with count sub-groups

items.title: Plain with text variant
items.reason: Added plain button with icon+text to variant examples

items.title: Links as buttons tabindex
items.reason: Changed disabled link tabindex from '0' to '-1' to match PF

items.title: Links as buttons danger secondary
items.reason: Added danger secondary link variant to Links as buttons demo

items.title: Call to action disabled
items.reason: Added disabled CTA variants (primary, secondary, tertiary, link)
